display_text: Tier 3: Neutral item providing the Vast enhancement. Increases the attack range of melee and ranged heroes. Adds 75 attack range for melee heroes and 110 for ranged heroes. Stats: Melee Range Bonus: +75, Ranged Range Bonus: +110.
